specs.summary: Contains mb_type() (1-arg) and mb_type3() (3-arg form, R1-R5). Dispatch by argument count lives in builtins.rs.
mb_class_register, C3 MRO, __init_subclass__ (R5), __set_name__ (R5). Shared by class statement and type() 3-arg.
dispatch_type wrapper routes 1-arg to mb_type and 3-arg to mb_type3 in stdlib/builtins_mod.rs.

codebase_notes: Key files: (1) crates/cclab-mamba/src/runtime/builtins.rs — add mb_type3(); (2) crates/cclab-mamba/src/runtime/stdlib/builtins_mod.rs — update dispatch_type to route 3-arg to mb_type3; (3) crates/cclab-mamba/src/runtime/class.rs — mb_class_register already handles MRO/hooks, shared infrastructure confirmed; (4) crates/cclab-mamba/tests/fixtures/conformance/class_system/type_3arg.py — new conformance test.
